☁️ Cloud Security Posture Scanner PRO+

Audit AWS, GCP, and Azure configurations against CIS Benchmarks. Detect IAM over-permissions, public S3 buckets, unencrypted volumes, and misconfigured security groups.

Auditing cloud configuration…

🕵️ Dark Web Exposure Scanner PRO+

Detect leaked credentials, breached emails, exposed API keys, and corporate data mentions across dark web paste sites, breach databases, and Tor indexers.

Searching breach databases and dark web indices…

📱 Application Security Scanner PRO+

Dynamic application security testing (DAST) against OWASP Top 10 Web. Detects SQLi, XSS, SSRF, broken auth, security misconfigurations, and sensitive data exposure.

Running OWASP Top 10 test suite…

MCP Security Scanner

World's First · Claude MCP · OpenAI Tools · LangChain

Scan your Model Context Protocol (MCP) server configuration for security vulnerabilities: unauthorized tool access, data exfiltration vectors, prompt injection surfaces, and privilege escalation paths.

MCP Server Configuration (JSON)
Or provide MCP server URL:
Server name:
Detects: Unrestricted tool scope · Missing auth enforcement · Data exfiltration chains · Prompt injection via tool results · Privilege escalation · Secret exposure · Missing rate limits · Session leakage

Why CYBERDUDEBIVASH?

Competing at the level of Cloudflare Security, Palo Alto Prisma, and CrowdStrike Falcon — purpose-built for AI-era threats.

🧠
AI-Powered Threat Detection
Every scan is processed by our CYBERDUDEBIVASH® AI engine — cross-referencing OWASP LLM Top 10, MITRE ATT&CK TTPs, and live threat intel feeds to surface real risks, not checkbox results.
OWASP LLM Top 10 MITRE ATT&CK AI Risk Scoring Prompt Injection Detection
📡
Real-Time Threat Intelligence
Sentinel APEX continuously monitors global threat actor activity — APT campaigns, zero-days, ransomware operators, and AI-weaponized exploits — delivered via our live Telegram channel and dashboard feed.
Live CVE Feed APT Tracking Zero-Day Alerts Sentinel APEX
🎯
Automated Red Team Simulation
Run 8 MITRE ATT&CK scenarios in seconds — Spear Phishing, Password Spray, Lateral Movement, DNS Tunneling, Cloud Privilege Escalation, and Ransomware Simulation — without deploying a single agent.
8 ATT&CK Scenarios Agentless Cloud Coverage Ransomware Sim
🔐
Zero Trust Architecture
NIST SP 800-207 aligned Zero Trust maturity assessment — evaluate MFA posture, JIT access enforcement, Conditional Access policies, RBAC gaps, and privileged account exposure across your entire identity surface.
NIST 800-207 ZT Maturity Score JIT Access FIDO2 Readiness

      💰 API ECONOMY · DEVELOPER PLATFORM
    



      Build on CYBERDUDEBIVASH
API Infrastructure




      Integrate real-time threat intel, CVE scoring, SOAR rule generation, and AI analysis directly into your security stack.
    









🔭


Threat Intel API


Real-time CVE feed, severity scores, CISA KEV data, APT group mappings.

GET /api/v1/threat-intel





⚡


CVE Intelligence API


Deep CVE analysis, exploit probability, affected systems, patch status.

POST /api/ai/analyze





🧬


SOAR Rule Generation


Auto-generate Sigma, YARA, KQL, Splunk SPL rules from CVE IDs.

POST /api/ai/generate-rules





🔍


IOC Feed API


Fresh indicators: IPs, domains, hashes. STIX 2.1 + JSON formats.

GET /api/v1/iocs





🤖


AI Analysis API


Conversational MYTHOS analyst over REST. Multi-turn context, intent detection.

POST /api/ai/chat





📡


Real-time Feed (SSE)


Server-sent events stream for live threat alerts. Sub-second latency.

GET /api/realtime/feed

💡 HOW TO PAY ON CYBERDUDEBIVASH


Simple 3-Step Payment Process


No credit card required · No Razorpay · Direct & instant









1




Click any payment button → Choose your method


Select from UPI · Bank Transfer · PayPal · Crypto. Payment details appear instantly. No account creation needed.









2




Transfer the exact amount to our details



UPI IDs: Loading…

Bank: Loading…

PayPal: Loading… (Friends & Family)

Crypto: Loading… (BEP20/ERC20)
          









3




Submit your Transaction ID + screenshot → Done!



            After paying, click ✅ I HAVE PAID, enter your Transaction ID (UTR/TX Hash), upload a screenshot of the payment, and submit. Our team verifies and activates your access within 2–4 hours. You'll receive a confirmation email.
          









⚡ Activation SLA




🟢 UPI / IMPS — usually within 2 hours


🟡 NEFT / Bank — up to 4 hours (banking hours)


🔵 PayPal — up to 4 hours after confirmation


⛓ Crypto — up to 6 hours (on-chain confirm)
